Funding Traders 31% OFF Deal

Funding Traders is offering a substantial 31% discount on all trading challenges using code LOVE. This promotion provides one of the steepest flat-rate discounts available on challenges that scale all the way up to a massive $300,000 account size — giving ambitious traders both a significant cost saving and access to some of the highest capital allocations in the prop trading industry at a dramatically reduced entry price.

Funding Traders is a proprietary trading firm that has built its reputation around offering high-capital challenges with no artificial time pressure. The firm supports MT5 and TradeLocker platforms, giving traders access to reliable, professional trading environments that accommodate both manual and algorithmic strategies. Funding Traders has attracted a following among experienced traders who want to pursue large capital allocation without the restrictive evaluation timelines found at many competing firms.

With code LOVE, you receive 31% off across all challenge tiers, including the flagship $300,000 account. For traders targeting the highest capital tier, this means accessing $300K in simulated capital at nearly a third less than the standard price. There are no time limits on any of the challenges, so you can focus purely on meeting the profit target without racing against a calendar deadline.

Funding Traders' trading conditions are consistent across all account sizes: clearly defined profit targets and drawdown limits, no time pressure, MT5 and TradeLocker platform support, and a broad selection of forex and CFD instruments. Their straightforward rules make it easy to plan your evaluation approach without having to navigate complex or contradictory restrictions.

To claim this deal, visit Funding Traders via the affiliate link above, select your preferred challenge size (up to $300K), and enter LOVE at checkout for a 31% reduction on your order total. This code is valid for all account tiers, so it works equally well whether you are starting with a small account to build confidence or going straight for the maximum $300K allocation.
